name: tiangong
description: Heaven's Craft. Infuses 5000 years of Chinese aesthetic wisdom into AI design — Xie He's Six Principles as the framework, the Five Daoist Wisdoms as the decision engine, and calligraphy / ink-painting / garden / porcelain traditions as ammunition. Completes Western design (Material / Swiss / Bauhaus) rather than replacing it. Triggers on UI/UX, color-palette, typography, layout, branding, whitespace, and 'this design has no soul' moments.
author: WUJI (wuji-labs)
